asset_name: GHK-Cu Human Topical and Hair Evidence Lead
status: HUMAN EVIDENCE LEAD — PRIMARY CONTROLLED SOURCES NOT CLOSED
domain: Topical cosmetic skin and hair claims
extracted_summary: Small controlled topical studies are repeatedly referenced in reviews and commercial literature.
Direct primary reports suitable for independent quantitative appraisal were not closed in Build 0019.
limitations: Publication and sponsor transparency are incomplete.
Topical outcomes cannot be transferred to injection.
permitted_claims: Human topical evidence remains an active source-closure task.
prohibited_claims: Definitive wrinkle, collagen or hair-growth effect sizes.
